meaning: n.男修道院院长,僧侣,神父
examples: They made Abbe a meteorologist (someone who studies weather conditions), and he began issuing forecasts three times a day.
The Abbe Chatain did not come himself as the messenger of Lily's deliverance.
The Abbe Sicard speaks of Sister Simplice in a letter to the deaf-mute Massieu.
